1.premise: Mandatory racial categorization in America is contrasted with homogeneous societies that skip the question for racist reasons, then with Asian countries that sort everyone into "Asian or intruders."

lines.text: We just finished the Black History Month.
lines.label: setup

lines.text: Fuck Asian here this month too.
lines.label: setup

lines.text: Why did they make our calendar racial?
lines.label: setup

lines.text: Seems like everywhere I go they want to ask for my race.
lines.label: setup

lines.text: You apply for school, what's your race?
lines.label: setup

lines.text: You apply for jobs, what's your race?
lines.label: setup

lines.text: See, where I grew up, they don't ask that question.
lines.label: setup

lines.text: Because we're better at keeping our bloodline pure.
lines.label: punchline

lines.text: So many different races to pick from under that question too.
lines.label: setup

lines.text: Hispanic, non-Hispanic, black, white, Pacific, Islander.
lines.label: setup

lines.text: In Asian countries, we just put people into two categories.
lines.label: setup
